output: {"match_id":"m026","winner":"B","rationale":"Both target redundant tool invocation with clear N=1 paths, but B is tighter and more discriminating: the immutable closed-day ledger guarantee makes repeat balance/history checks objectively zero-value while still tempting via “verify financial data carefully.” Pilot signal also favors B on target dim (3.2 vs 2.8).
